translations.en: a man nearly as wide as he is tall.
translations.zh: 一個寬度幾乎與高度相當的男子。

translations.en: "What now?" he sighs.
translations.zh: 「又怎麼了？」他嘆氣道。

translations.en: "What?" he grumbles.
translations.zh: 「什麼？」他嘟囔道。

translations.en: "As the sign on my door reads, '@Mortude the Ropemaker.'"
translations.zh: 「就如在下門上的招牌所寫，『@Mortude（莫圖）德索具匠』。」

translations.en: "What?" He snorts a bit then clears his throat.
translations.zh: 「什麼？」他哼了一聲，清了清嗓子。

translations.en: He looks at you and raises one eyebrow. "I said I makes @rope."
translations.zh: 他看著汝，挑起一側眉毛。「在下說了，在下做@rope（繩索）。」

translations.en: "The strongest you'll ever tug!" he says, pushing out his chest.
translations.zh: 「汝見過最結實的那種！」他挺起胸膛說。

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open and I'll show you!"
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來鋪子，在下讓汝開開眼！」

translations.en: "He's a pretty good @flippits, player."
translations.zh: 「他是個不錯的@flippits（骨彈）戲高手。」

translations.en: "You have a @bone on ya? We'll play."
translations.zh: 「汝身上有@bone（骨頭）嗎？咱們來玩。」

translations.en: "An old @dog bone or somethin'?"
translations.zh: 「一塊舊@dog（狗骨）頭之類的？」

translations.en: "The smaller, the better. And maybe a @hat."
translations.zh: 「越小越好，再加頂@hat（帽子）就行了。」

translations.en: "A haaat," he repeats, mockingly. "Never played 'ave ya?"
translations.zh: 「帽～子，」他嘲弄地重複道。「從沒玩過吧？」

translations.en: "Too bad."
translations.zh: 「太可惜了。」

translations.en: "Yeah, yeah." He plods off, grumbling.
translations.zh: 「嗯嗯。」他嘟囔著蹣跚離去。

translations.en: "Oh, never mind..."
He plays with his braided hair a moment then shrugs.
translations.zh: 他擺弄著自己的辮子片刻，然後聳聳肩。

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "Too bad. You'll never find better rope."
translations.zh: 「太可惜了，汝再也找不到更好的繩索了。」

translations.en: $N smiles at $Y, "For my fine rope it will cost you 5 gold. Interested?"
translations.zh: $N朝$Y微笑，「上等繩索，5金一條，有興趣嗎？」

translations.en: "Too bad. You'll never find better rope."
translations.zh: 「太可惜了，汝再也找不到更好的繩索了。」

translations.en: "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來已裝得滿滿的了。」

translations.en: "Fine, fine!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the rope.
translations.zh: 「行，行！」收下$Y的金幣後，$N遞出繩索。

translations.en: "You don't have enough gold."
translations.zh: 「汝的金幣不夠。」

translator_notes: 100 Mortude: 索具匠，圓胖粗魯，口頭禪是嘟囔和嘆氣。與辛德爾是骨彈戲玩伴。繩索商。
